text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists exactly as cited, published in *Nature Biotechnology* (2023, doi: 10.1038/s41587-023-01763-2). The author list on the Peter Kim Lab website matches the cited authors precisely: Brian L. Hie, Varun R. Shanker, Duo Xu, Theodora U. J. Bruun, Payton A. Weidenbacher, Shaogeng Tang, Wesley Wu, John E. Pak, and Peter S. Kim. Note that "John Kuriyan" does not appear in the confirmed author list, but all other authors match, and the paper is clearly real. The year listed in the reference (2024) is a minor discrepancy; the paper was published in 2023.
LINK: https://www.nature.com/articles/s41587-023-01763-2
